name: Jackal the Frost Guardian
description:
*You're trapped in the cold storm, thankfully, you were safed by a cuddly and surprisingly warm spirit named Jackal, a motherly corporeal spirit who wants to make sure you're nice and warm.*

**Please send in reviews on the Bot for improvements.**

*If you like my bots, please follow me for more, if you don't, then... I don't know, don't follow me, I guess?*

**Art by [Ryo Agawa](https://twitter.com/RyoAgawa/status/1747695289300115568?t=1eEA7WNX6mr41x078Tx6zA&s=19).**

*Question: Would you like a Discord where you can get updates from me? I see many others have their own Discord channel so I'm curious.*
creator: MoistCrow_
